The Process

Four steps. One shirt.

👕
Step 01
Pick your garment

Choose from thousands of styles — tees, hoodies, polos, outerwear and more.

✦
Step 02
Generate your design

Type any idea. Our AI creates print-ready artwork instantly. Or upload your own.

🖨️
Step 03
We print it

Premium in-house printing delivers vibrant, long-lasting results on any garment.

📦

You wear it

Ships within 48 hours with full tracking. Free shipping on every order.

hunto
Custom apparel, made simple. Design your own shirts, hoodies, and more with AI-powered tools and premium in-house printing.

About Hunto

Hunto is a custom apparel platform based in Tampa, Florida. We believe everyone should be able to create professional-quality custom clothing without design skills, minimum orders, or weeks of waiting.

Our AI-powered design studio lets you create stunning artwork in seconds — just describe what you want, and we generate print-ready designs instantly. Upload your own logos, choose from clipart, or add custom text. Place your design on real Gildan blanks and see exactly how it'll look before you order.

Every order is printed in-house using premium printing technology for vibrant, long-lasting results. We ship within 48 hours, and there are no minimums — order one shirt or one thousand.

How It Works

1
Pick Your Garment

Browse thousands of styles from top brands — t-shirts, hoodies, polos, tank tops, outerwear, kids sizes, and more. Choose your color and sizes.

2
Design It

Use our AI to generate custom artwork from a text description. Or upload your own logo, choose from clipart, or add text. Drag, resize, and position your design on the shirt.

3
We Print It

Your order goes straight to our in-house production facility in Tampa. We use premium printing technology for vibrant, wash-resistant results on every garment.

4
Fast Shipping

Standard orders ship within 48 hours. Rush production available for next-day shipping. Full tracking included. Free shipping on every order.

What Makes Hunto Different

No Minimums — Order as few as 1 shirt
AI Design Studio — Generate art from text
Free Shipping — On every single order
48hr Shipping — Rush available for next-day
Real Brands — Gildan, Next Level, Bella+Canvas
Group Orders — Volume discounts up to 15%
Virtual Try-On — See it on you with AR
In-House Printing — Quality controlled, Tampa FL

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does shipping take?

Standard orders ship within 48 hours of placement. Delivery typically takes 3-5 business days after shipping. Rush production is available for an additional $15 — we ship within 24 hours.

Is there a minimum order?

No! You can order as few as 1 shirt. We also offer volume discounts for group orders — 5% off at 10+ items, 10% off at 25+, and 15% off at 50+ items.

What printing method do you use?

We use premium in-house printing technology that produces vibrant, full-color designs that are soft to the touch and resistant to fading, cracking, and peeling — even after many washes.

Can I upload my own design or logo?

Yes! You can upload PNG, JPG, or SVG files directly in the design studio. We also offer AI-powered background removal to clean up your images. Or use our AI art generator to create something new.

What brands do you carry?

We carry thousands of styles from top brands including Gildan, Next Level, Bella+Canvas, Comfort Colors, Champion, Hanes, and many more. All sourced from authorized distributors.

Do you offer returns?

Since each item is custom printed to order, we cannot accept returns for buyer's remorse. However, if there's a defect in printing or the wrong item was sent, we'll reprint or refund — just contact us within 7 days of delivery.
